message:
chore: add ephemeral test files to .gitignore

Ignore child.json, parent.json, test_cycle.rs, and test_jc1j.sh —
agent-generated scratch files that should not be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -139,3 +139,9 @@ report.json
 .codex-local-check/
 .codex-bench/
 .codex-tmp/
+
+# Ephemeral test/debug files at repo root
+/child.json
+/parent.json
+/test_cycle.rs
+/test_jc1j.sh
